# Grid Velocity

> Grid Velocity is a production, design and web studio based in Pakistan, founded by Zohaib Burki and Shaina Noor. We serve direct brands and agency partners across Pakistan and internationally.

## About

Grid Velocity is a small core team intertwined with a network of elite independents. We are specialists in first impressions — helping forward-thinking businesses present their products and ideas to the world.

Founded: 2024
Locations: Karachi, Lahore, Dubai, Toronto
Contact: hello@gridvelocity.com
Website: https://gridvelocity.com

## Services

- **Branding** — Visual identity, logo design, brand systems and packaging. Built to last.
- **Video** — DVCs, brand films, factory and event coverage, photography, 2D/3D animation and AI-powered video content.
- **Websites** — Webflow (primary), Shopify (e-commerce) and custom development. Designed to convert.
- **Paid Ads** — Meta (primary), Google, TikTok. Strategy, creative and media management.

## Selected Work

- Food Monsters — Packaging & Branding
- ONIC Pakistan — Branding & Campaign
- Halal Boys — Brand Identity
- Enkay Consulting — Branding & Web
- Brew Box — Brand Identity & Packaging
- Kati Baba — Branding
- Sublime by Sara — E-commerce & Shopify
- RED Publicis — Website Design
- Isaac Merch — E-commerce & Branding
- DLC — Branding & Print

## Engagement Models

- **Custom Package** — Scoped precisely, executed completely. One engagement, built to last.
- **Subscription** — Flexible ongoing retainer. Scale up, slow down, or pivot — we move with you.
